pick.title: Select iZone bridge
pick.description: Bridges supporting the V2 local API were discovered on your network.

manual.title: Connect to iZone bridge
manual.description: No V2-capable bridge was discovered automatically. Enter the IP address of your iZone bridge.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect, or the bridge does not support the V2 local API

abort.already_configured: This iZone system is already configured
